summary: The test suite has solid logical coverage (26 unit tests + 13 workflow tests across all core functions and bump scenarios), but CANNOT EXECUTE. Critical fixture files are referenced but not provided: fixtures/feat-minor/{package.json,commits.txt}, fixtures/fix-patch/{package.json,commits.txt}, fixtures/breaking-major/{package.json,commits.txt}, plus .actrc and the workflow file .github/workflows/semantic-version-bumper.yml. The unit tests are well-designed with good isolation and clear names, but the act-based integration tests will fail immediately on file copy operations (New-ActSandbox). The test logic itself is sound (4/5 design), but brittleness issues exist: hard-coded "Tests Passed: 26" assertion, string-based changelog validation via regex. Edge case coverage is weak (no tests for malformed JSON, truncated files, special characters, or error paths through act). Without the fixture data and workflow definition, this test suite is non-functional as written.
